Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission  BPSSC has released the advertisement Advt. No.-09/2026: For Selection of Police Sub-Inspector (General Closed Cadre) in Special Branch under Home (Police) Dept., Govt. of Bihar Those Candidates Are Interested with BPSSC Sub Inspector SI  Can Apply Online from 09/07/2026 to 09/08/2026. For other information related to Bihar Police Sub Inspector SI recruitment like age limit, qualification, pay scale and all other information read the advertisement and then apply.
